subject: A short, bald humanoid fighter in a dark purple gi and white-and-gold armor vest, standing guard with arms raised in a defensive block posture
description: A short, bald figure stands in a guarded defensive stance with forearms raised across the body. The figure wears a dark purple gi under a white and gold armored vest or chest piece. The head is round and bald with no visible nose, consistent with the character's canonical design. The background shows a pale gradient with minimal environmental detail. The expression is alert and braced for impact. The composition is a mid-shot emphasizing the defensive posture.
foreground: Short bald fighter in dark gi and armor vest in defensive block stance
